title: Deercrow shuffles Scarecrow or Big Buck sacrifice back

card.rawText: Summon Requirement: If summoned by sacrificing "Scarecrow" or "Big Buck", send 1 of them back to your deck, then shuffle. This card receives 2x effects from Common / Uncommon magic cards for Hit, Atk, Atk Dice Rolls, and SPD.

effect.value: Summon Requirement: If summoned by sacrificing "Scarecrow" or "Big Buck", send 1 of them back to your deck, then shuffle. This card receives 2x effects from Common / Uncommon magic cards for Hit, Atk, Atk Dice Rolls, and SPD.

plan.title: Deercrow shuffles Scarecrow or Big Buck sacrifice back
plan.summary: Summon Deercrow using Scarecrow or Big Buck and verify one of them is sent back to deck and shuffled.

notes: Read text first: Summon Requirement: If summoned by sacrificing "Scarecrow" or "Big Buck", send 1 of them back to your deck, then shuffle. This card receives 2x effects from Common / Uncommon magic cards for Hit, Atk, Atk Dice Rolls, and SPD.
